offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll filings/month, manual data entry causes late filings. We convert raw payroll data into formatted tax compliance filings instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Timely and accurate tax compliance filings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage on Indie Hackers about payroll solutions
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demos
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try error-checking for payroll data and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
